failure.message: AssertionError: Critical JavaScript errors found: [{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769313151765}] assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len([{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769313151765}])

testcase.name: test_quick_access_panel_toggle

failure.message:
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1509, 72). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.97); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000104604640 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3087720 1 chromedriver 0x00000001045fc8b4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3055580 2 chromedriver 0x00000001040e2890 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75272 3 chromedriver 0x0000000104131b08 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 399488 4 chromedriver 0x0000000104130030 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 392616 5 chromedriver 0x000000010412dd98 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 383760 6 chromedriver 0x000000010412d138 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 380592 7 chromedriver 0x0000000104121d28 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 334496 8 chromedriver 0x00000001041217a4 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 333084 9 chromedriver 0x000000010416b064 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 634332 10 chromedriver 0x00000001041200e4 _RNvCs5DBLTqoOdVp_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 327260 11 chromedriver 0x00000001045c3620 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2821448 12 chromedriver 0x00000001045c6d5c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2835588 13 chromedriver 0x00000001045a89c4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2711788 14 chromedriver 0x00000001045c75e0 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2837768 15 chromedriver 0x0000000104598990 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2646200 16 chromedriver 0x00000001045eb9bc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2986212 17 chromedriver 0x00000001045ebb38 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2986592 18 chromedriver 0x00000001045fc50c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3054644 19 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x0000000182b95c08 _pthread_start + 136 20 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x0000000182b90ba8 thread_start + 8

testcase.failure:
tests/test_e2e_ui.py:86: in test_quick_access_panel_toggle toggle.click() test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/remote/webelement.py:114: in click self._execute(Command.CLICK_ELEMENT) test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/remote/webelement.py:508: in _execute return self._parent.execute(command, params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/remote/webdriver.py:432: in execute self.error_handler.check_response(response) test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/remote/errorhandler.py:232: in check_response raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1509, 72). Other element would receive the click:
...
